creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce it.
 
 Make sure you have a clean ports tree, with no left-over "work"  
 directory in print/texinfo.
 
 I suggest you to try a "make clean-depends depends" in print/lilypond,  
 and see whether texinfo is brought in.
 
 -- 
 Pietro Cerutti
 gahr@FreeBSD.org
 
 PGP Public Key:
 http://gahr.ch/pgp
